title: 桜花賞の後に・最初の宝石

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Just listen to those cheers. They're all looking at
me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So this is what it's like to be the number one racer
in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This is how things should be. I won't give this spot
up—not to anyone.
choice_data_list: Then we've just got to keep winning.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Naturally. I'll get first place again and again.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll win every race there is and prove that I'm the
number one Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Time to continue my Tiara tour. Next up is... the
Japanese Oaks!
